ddls:
CREATE TABLE "farmers_markets" (
  "market_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each farmers market */,
  "market_name" TEXT /* Name of the farmers market */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website URL of the farmers market */,
  "street_address" TEXT /* Street address of the market location */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the market is located */,
  "county" TEXT /* County where the market is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the market is located */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* ZIP code of the market location */,
  "schedule" TEXT /* Operational schedule of the market */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the market location */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the market location */,
  "location_type" TEXT /* Type of location (e.g., public park, private property) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the market */,
  "social_media" TEXT /* Social media links of the market */,
  "parking_info" TEXT /* Parking information for the market */,
  "payment_methods" TEXT /* Payment methods accepted at the market */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("market_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vendors" (
  "vendor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vendor */,
  "market_id" INTEGER /* ID of the farmers market in which the vendor participates */,
  "vendor_name" TEXT /* Name of the vendor or business */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email of the vendor */,
  "product_type" TEXT /* Type of products sold by the vendor */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website or social media link of the vendor */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the vendor's products or services */,
  "product_image" TEXT /* Image of the vendor's products */,
  "market_schedule" TEXT /* Schedule of the vendor at the market */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vendor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vendors_market_id FOREIGN KEY ("market_id") REFERENCES farmers_markets ("market_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "market_id" INTEGER /* ID of the farmers market being reviewed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user submitting the review */,
  "review_title" TEXT /* Title of the review */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text comment of the review */,
  "review_rating" INTEGER /* Rating given to the market (1-5 scale) */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date when the review was submitted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_reviews_market_id FOREIGN KEY ("market_id") REFERENCES farmers_markets ("market_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., customer, vendor, admin) */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date the user registered in the system */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user (hashed for security) */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "market_id" INTEGER /* ID of the farmers market hosting the event */,
  "event_name" TEXT /* Name of the event */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date of the event */,
  "event_time" TEXT /* Time of the event */,
  "event_description" TEXT /* Description of the event */,
  "event_image" TEXT /* Image related to the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_events_market_id FOREIGN KEY ("market_id") REFERENCES farmers_markets ("market_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_participation" (
  "participation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each participation record */,
  "market_id" INTEGER /* ID of the farmers market being tracked */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the market */,
  "number_of_vendors" INTEGER /* Number of vendors participating on that date */,
  "number_of_customers" INTEGER /* Number of customers attending on that date */,
  "participation_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the market participation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("participation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_participation_market_id FOREIGN KEY ("market_id") REFERENCES farmers_markets ("market_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "market_id" INTEGER /* ID of the market related to the notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., event reminder, market update) */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message content of the notification */,
  "sent_date" TEXT /* Date when the notification was sent */,
  "notification_status" TEXT /* Status of the notification (e.g., sent, read, deleted) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_notifications_market_id FOREIGN KEY ("market_id") REFERENCES farmers_markets ("market_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location entry */,
  "market_id" INTEGER /* ID of the farmers market this location entry belongs to */,
  "location_description" TEXT /* Description of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the location */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the location */,
  "location_image" TEXT /* Image related to the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_locations_market_id FOREIGN KEY ("market_id") REFERENCES farmers_markets ("market_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_photos" (
  "photo_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each photo */,
  "market_id" INTEGER /* ID of the farmers market this photo is associated with */,
  "photo_url" TEXT /* URL of the photo */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date when the photo was uploaded */,
  "photo_description" TEXT /* Description of the photo */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("photo_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_photos_market_id FOREIGN KEY ("market_id") REFERENCES farmers_markets ("market_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_committees" (
  "committee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each committee */,
  "market_id" INTEGER /* ID of the farmers market this committee is associated with */,
  "committee_name" TEXT /* Name of the committee */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the committee */,
  "committee_description" TEXT /* Description of the committee's role and responsibilities */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("committee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_committees_market_id FOREIGN KEY ("market_id") REFERENCES farmers_markets ("market_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistics entry */,
  "market_id" INTEGER /* ID of the farmers market this statistics entry belongs to */,
  "total_vendors" INTEGER /* Total number of vendors over time */,
  "total_visitors" INTEGER /* Total number of visitors over time */,
  "total_sales" REAL /* Total sales made at the market */,
  "stat_date" TEXT /* Date when the statistics were recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_statistics_market_id FOREIGN KEY ("market_id") REFERENCES farmers_markets ("market_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "market_id" INTEGER /* ID of the farmers market for which feedback is collected */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user submitting feedback */,
  "feedback_text" TEXT /* Text of the feedback */,
  "feedback_rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user */,
  "submitted_date" TEXT /* Date when the feedback was submitted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_feedback_market_id FOREIGN KEY ("market_id") REFERENCES farmers_markets ("market_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_hours" (
  "hours_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hours entry */,
  "market_id" INTEGER /* ID of the farmers market this hours entry belongs to */,
  "day_of_week" TEXT /* Day of the week for which these hours apply */,
  "opening_time" TEXT /* Opening time of the market */,
  "closing_time" TEXT /* Closing time of the market */,
  "holiday_hours" TEXT /* Special hours for holidays */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hours_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_hours_market_id FOREIGN KEY ("market_id") REFERENCES farmers_markets ("market_id")
)
